episode_metadata.episode_title: มะลิช่วยนกตัวน้อย
episode_metadata.main_outfit: Bright yellow t-shirt under yellow denim overalls, white sneakers with pink laces
episode_metadata.voice_style: Consistent 3-year-old Thai girl voice, sweet and high-pitched

storyboard.image_prompt: 3D Pixar style, 3-year-old Mali, 2 pigtail buns, pink flower clip, wearing a bright yellow outfit. She is standing in a lush green backyard with a large mango tree. Sunlight filtering through leaves. 9:16 aspect ratio, ultra-detailed.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Mali in yellow outfit in a sunny backyard. Camera: Medium shot, slow Pan Left. Audio: Mali's consistent high-pitched sweet Thai girl voice. 0-3s: Mali skips joyfully through the grass. 3-6s: She stops and tilts her ear toward a sound. 6-8s: She looks up at the tree with a curious smile. (Mali: 'เอ๊ะ... เสียงนกที่ไหนร้องคะ?')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: เอ๊ะ... เสียงนกที่ไหนร้องคะ?

storyboard.image_prompt: Close-up of a small blue baby bird shivering on a low tree branch. Detailed feathers, 3D Pixar rendering. The background is blurred green foliage.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Small blue baby bird on a branch. Camera: Macro close-up, static. 0-4s: The bird chirps weakly and shivers. 4-8s: Camera pulls back to reveal Mali’s face entering the frame, looking worried. Audio: Mali's high-pitched sweet voice, soft and gentle tone. (Mali: 'โอ๋ๆ... เจ้านกน้อย ตกลงมาหรอจ๊ะ?')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: โอ๋ๆ... เจ้านกน้อย ตกลงมาหรอจ๊ะ?

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali reaching out her small hand toward the bird. Only one baby bird on the branch. Mali’s yellow sleeve is visible. Soft morning light, 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Mali’s small hand approaching the bird. Camera: Point-of-view from Mali's perspective. 0-3s: Mali’s hand moves slowly and steadily. 3-6s: She gently strokes the bird's head with one finger. 6-8s: The bird stops shivering. Audio: Mali's sweet childlike voice, whispering. (Mali: 'ไม่ต้องกลัวนะ... มะลิอยู่นี่แล้ว')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: ไม่ต้องกลัวนะ... มะลิอยู่นี่แล้ว

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali looking around for the bird's mother. A wooden birdhouse is visible high up in the tree. 3D garden environment, ultra-realistic textures.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Mali looking up and around the backyard. Camera: Low angle, rotating around Mali. 0-4s: Mali puts a hand over her eyes to block the sun, looking up. 4-8s: She points at the birdhouse high above. Audio: Mali's energetic and bright Thai girl voice. (Mali: 'บ้านเจ้านกอยู่นั่นเอง... สูงจังเลยค่ะ')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: บ้านเจ้านกอยู่นั่นเอง... สูงจังเลยค่ะ

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali calling out for her Dad. Her mouth is wide open, hand cupped around her mouth. Vibrant yellow outfit, 3D Pixar style.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Mali calling for help. Camera: Medium close-up, front view. 0-3s: Mali cups her hands around her mouth. 3-6s: She calls out loudly with a big smile. 6-8s: She hops up and down. Audio: Mali's loud, high-pitched, energetic Thai girl voice. (Mali: 'คุณพ่อขา! มาช่วยนกน้อยหน่อยค่ะ!')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: คุณพ่อขา! มาช่วยนกน้อยหน่อยค่ะ!

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali's Dad (tall, kind Thai man) entering the frame, carrying a small wooden ladder. Mali is jumping with joy next to him. 9:16 vertical.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Dad and Mali by the tree. Camera: Wide shot, static. 0-3s: Dad walks in and sets the ladder. 4-8s: Mali claps her hands rapidly in excitement. Audio: Mali's giggling and happy high-pitched voice. (Mali: 'เย้! คุณพ่อมาแล้ว ช่วยเจ้านกด้วยนะคะ')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: เย้! คุณพ่อมาแล้ว ช่วยเจ้านกด้วยนะคะ

storyboard.image_prompt: Close-up of Mali watching her Dad's hand (carrying the bird) reaching for the birdhouse. Mali's eyes are wide with anticipation.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Mali's reaction. Camera: Close-up on Mali’s face. 0-4s: Mali watches intently, her eyes moving upward following the bird. 4-8s: She holds her breath, then gasps with joy. Audio: Mali's soft, breathy, excited voice. (Mali: 'ใกล้ถึงแล้ว... ฮึบๆ นะคะคุณพ่อ')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: ใกล้ถึงแล้ว... ฮึบๆ นะคะคุณพ่อ

storyboard.image_prompt: The baby bird safely inside the birdhouse with its mother bird. Mali is visible below, waving. Cinematic lighting, warm and happy.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Birdhouse with birds inside. Camera: Tilt down from the birdhouse to Mali on the ground. 0-4s: Mali waves both hands at the birdhouse. 4-8s: She blows a kiss upward. Audio: Mali's high-pitched, sweet, and satisfied Thai girl voice. (Mali: 'ถึงบ้านแล้วนะจ๊ะ... บ๊ายบายเจ้านกน้อย')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: ถึงบ้านแล้วนะจ๊ะ... บ๊ายบายเจ้านกน้อย

storyboard.image_prompt: Dad hugging Mali in the garden. Mali is beaming with pride. The yellow outfit looks vibrant against the green grass. 3D Pixar style.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Dad hugging Mali. Camera: Medium shot, warm lighting. 0-3s: Dad picks Mali up and hugs her. 4-8s: Mali puts her arms around Dad's neck and nuzzles his cheek. Audio: Mali's sweet, loving, and clear Thai girl voice. (Mali: 'มะลิมีความสุขจังเลยค่ะคุณพ่อ')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: มะลิมีความสุขจังเลยค่ะคุณพ่อ

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali waving to the camera, standing under the mango tree. The sun is setting, creating a golden glow. 9:16 finale shot.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Mali's final wave. Camera: Slow Dolly Out. 0-4s: Mali waves at the camera with a huge smile. 4-8s: She spins around once, her pigtails flying. Audio: Mali's bright, energetic, high-pitched Thai girl voice. (Mali: 'ช่วยนกน้อยแล้วใจดีจัง... พรุ่งนี้มาดูมะลิใหม่นะ บ๊ายบายค่ะ!')
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: ช่วยนกน้อยแล้วใจดีจัง... พรุ่งนี้มาดูมะลิใหม่นะ บ๊ายบายค่ะ!
